nodes.label: sanad-lawyer-clients.png
nodes.summary: UI screenshot of the Sanad (سند) legal app's العملاء (Clients) view. Displays a card-based client directory in Arabic RTL layout. Shows 7 sample clients split between individual (فرد) and business (منشأة) types, each with phone, email, national ID, address, and badge counts for cases/invoices/contacts. Includes a top role switcher (طالب/محامي), a search bar, an Add Client button, and a right-side navigation sidebar. PWA support noted in footer.

nodes.label: Clients View (العملاء)
nodes.summary: The العملاء (Clients) section of the Sanad app. Acts as a client directory showing contacts, cases, invoices, and communication history. Supports search by name or phone. Provides an 'Add Client' CTA.

properties.subtitle: دليل عملائك — جهات الاتصال، القضايا، الفواتير، وسجل الاتصالات

nodes.label: Client Card Component
nodes.summary: Reusable card UI pattern used for each client in the directory. Displays: client type badge (فرد/منشأة), phone, email, national ID, address, and pill badges for case/invoice/contact counts. Also shows a short free-text note describing the client relationship.

nodes.label: Sanad Navigation Sidebar
nodes.summary: Right-side RTL navigation sidebar in the Sanad app. Contains links to: لوحة التحكم (Dashboard), العملاء (Clients, active), لوحة القضايا (Cases Board), الاتصالات (Communications), المستندات (Documents), الفواتير (Invoices), الامتثال (Compliance, badge:4), المهام (Tasks, badge:9), العمل العميق (Deep Work), التقويم (Calendar).

nodes.label: Role Switcher (طالب / محامي)
nodes.summary: Top-bar toggle that switches the app between Lawyer (محامي) and Student (طالب) modes. In this screenshot محامي mode is active.
